Thanks for the PR! A few things to check before submitting:
- For non-trivial changes, there should be an open issue this PR addresses.

- Don't bump the version; releases are cut by the maintainer.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The diff is focused on one concern; no drive-by reformatting.
- [ ] I updated [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) if this changes architecture, conventions, or adds a gotcha.
- [ ] I tested the change manually and described it above.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files are included in the diff.
